prompt: I need a customization spec for the following: a Client Script on the Sales Order record that auto-populates the Estimated Ship Date field based on each item's lead time (stored as a custom field `custitem_lead_time_days` on the Item record) whenever a sales rep adds or changes a line item. If multiple lines have different lead times, use the longest one. The spec ID should be CUST-O2C-03.

assertions.description: Document header contains the exact Spec ID CUST-O2C-03
Script type is identified as Client Script (not User Event, Scheduled, or other type)
Trigger is fieldChanged or sublistChanged on the Sales Order item sublist — the correct CS entry point for line-level changes
The source field `custitem_lead_time_days` is explicitly referenced in the affected fields table or pseudocode
Business logic section contains pseudocode or decision logic that iterates lines and selects the maximum lead time value
Edge cases section addresses at least: item with no lead time set (null), single line scenario, and re-evaluation when a line is removed
Testing section contains at least 3 test cases with specific input data and expected results
